all.summary:
Advantages (Pros)
Outstanding food quality, fresh and flavorful dishes, perfectly cooked with a professional touch, creative recipes, beautiful presentation, satisfying portions, good variety of meals and snacks, excellent and friendly service, warm hospitality, cozy and relaxing ambiance, fair prices, and consistent quality.

Disadvantages (Cons)
Some dishes were served cold and did not taste freshly cooked; milk teas were reported as too sweet, even when requesting less sugar.
